title: 6 Jeff Auxier Stocks Approaching 52-Week Lows

title: 3 Reasons Why CSX (CSX) Is a Great Growth Stock
text: CSX (CSX) possesses solid growth attributes, which could help it handily outperform the market.

title: 3 Companies Growing Earnings Fast
text: The S&P 500 saw the trailing 12-month real earnings per share of its member companies increase by a compound annual growth rate of 12.6% over the past five years. The index, which stood at 3,759.89 as of Wednesday, has climbed approximately 55% over the past five years.

title: After Plunging 6.2% in 4 Weeks, Here's Why the Trend Might Reverse for CSX (CSX)
text: CSX (CSX) is technically in oversold territory now, so the heavy selling pressure might have exhausted. This along with strong agreement among Wall Street analysts in raising earnings estimates could lead to a trend reversal for the stock.

title: CSX Announces Date for Second Quarter Earnings Release and Earnings Call
text: JACKSONVILLE, Fla., June 22, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- CSX Corp. (NASDAQ: CSX) will release second quarter financial and operating results after the market close on Wednesday, July 20, 2022. This will be followed by a conference call and live webcast hosted by the company's management team at 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time.

title: Geopolitical Conflict, Not Fed, is the Main Concern for Stocks
text: At this stage, it will be better to stay with quality stocks with a favorable Zacks Rank. These are: CSX, FDX, LMT, AVGO and EPD.

title: The 7 Smartest Nasdaq Stocks to Buy If You Have $250 Right Now
text: Investors have hammered these under-valued Nasdaq stocks, creating strong buy opportunities in each of them. The post The 7 Smartest Nasdaq Stocks to Buy If You Have $250 Right Now appeared first on InvestorPlace.

title: 7 Stocks Seeing Significant Insider Buying
text: One of the best ways to spot potential opportunities is by tracking insider buying. After all, these people know their company best.

title: 5 Stocks the World's Top Investors Are Loading Up on Right Now
text: It's not smart to just copy what big investors are buying, but it can be profitable to look at their purchases for promising investment ideas.

title: Pan Am Railways is now part of CSX
text: New England short line Pan Am Railways is now officially part of CSX. Jacksonville, Florida-headquartered CSX has completed its acquisition of Pan Am, which the railroad says will expand CSX's reach into the rapidly growing Northeast region.

title: CSX Completes Acquisition of Pan Am Railways
text: JACKSONVILLE, Fla., June 01, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- CSX Corp. (NASDAQ: CSX) today announced it has completed the acquisition of Pan Am Railways, Inc. (Pan Am), expanding its reach into the rapidly growing Northeast region of the country.
